name: Chalk Barrens
description: A planet of vast white plains and crumbling badlands, coated in layers of pale chalk dust and broken stone. Hailstorms roll across the open flats constantly, stripping flesh from the unprepared. Settlements are squat, plastered-over rubble heaps — built low to survive the sky.
mood: Relentless and exposed — the sky is always attacking, and the ground is always crumbling underfoot. There is nowhere to hide and nothing soft.
biome: Chalk flatlands and stone badlands scoured by perpetual hailstorms
enemies:
FODDER (cost 1–2, swarms):
- Dust Runner — fast melee charger that rams and retreats. A scraggly, chalk-caked humanoid with knuckle wraps and bare feet.
- Sling Rat — ranged fodder that pelts stones from a distance. A hunched, wiry creature with a leather sling and beady eyes.
- Plaster Crawler — slow, clings to walls and drops onto targets. A pale, flat lizard with a chalky shell-like hide.
- Hail Pup — rushes in packs, dies fast. A small, grey dog-like beast with a stone-hard skull used for headbutts.

STANDARD (cost 3–4, core threats):
- Rubble Brute — heavy melee, kicks chunks of stone at range. A thick-limbed humanoid wrapped in cracked plaster armour.
- Chalk Knight — shielded melee fighter, advances in a straight line. A stocky warrior in white stone plate with a flanged mace.
- Hail Lobber — lobs hailstone clusters at groups. A gaunt figure in layered wrappings, always looking at the sky.
- Ram Toad — charges in a straight line, knocking targets back. A big grey toad with a boulder-dense forehead and stubby legs.

ELITE (cost 5–6, dangerous specialists):
- Dust Brawler — fast, hits multiple targets in one turn, hard to pin. A whirling humanoid fighter trailing a permanent chalk cloud.
- Plaster Golem — slow, high armour, crumbles into smaller threats when killed. A man-shaped mass of dried plaster and embedded rock.
- Hail Witch — rains ice stones across a wide area each turn. A tall woman in cracked white robes with a sky-facing iron staff.
- Boulder Roller — pushes a massive stone ball down a lane. A four-armed grey beast that grins when it crushes things.

BOSS (cost 7+, encounter centrepieces):
- Storm Drake — calls hail at the start of every round, flies out of melee reach. A bloated, winged reptile whose skin crackles with frost.
- Chalk Titan — enormous, tramples whole tiles, regenerates armour from the ground. A two-storey plaster-and-stone giant with a flat, featureless face.
- Crack Wyrm — burrows under the battlefield, surfaces to bite then re-submerges. A long pale serpent with a wedge-shaped head built for drilling.
- Ram Captain — charges the full length of the battlefield, carries a reinforced stone shield used as a battering ram. A scarred humanoid general in cracked full plate.
items:
- Short Sword (weapon (sword), common): A plain blade, reliable at close range.
- Mace (weapon (mace), common): A heavy flanged head that cracks armour on hit.
- Spear (weapon (spear), common): Long polearm; keeps enemies at arm's length.
- Chalk Spear (weapon (spear), uncommon): Tip coated in blinding chalk dust; hits reduce enemy accuracy.
- Hand Crossbow (weapon (bow), common): A compact crossbow, one hand free.
- Stone Bow (weapon (bow), uncommon): Fires dense stone bolts; slower but hits harder.
- Iron Staff (weapon (staff), common): A heavy iron rod good for bashing and blocking.
- Hail Staff (weapon (staff), rare): Slams the ground and scatters a burst of ice shards across nearby tiles.
- Maul (weapon (two-handed), common): A two-handed stone-headed hammer; slow, hits very hard.
- Rubble Flail (weapon (two-handed), uncommon): A chain with a jagged rock head; ignores shields on hit.
- Plaster Shield (shield, common): A round shield of hardened plaster; light but chips under heavy blows.
- Stone Kite (shield, uncommon): A tall kite shield carved from flat rock; heavy, excellent coverage.
- Chalk Wrap (accessory, common): Wound cloth coated in chalk; reduces bleeding effects.
- Storm Cloak (accessory, uncommon): A thick waxed cloak; reduces hail and area damage each turn.
- Dust Flask (consumable, common): Thrown at a tile; blinds targets in the area for one round.
- Health Potion (consumable, common): A clay vial of red liquid; restores a chunk of health.
